titles.title: To direct the Secretary of Agriculture to conduct a study on ways to increase opportunities for 1890 Institutions to conduct educational programs and provide technical assistance with respect to issues relating to the transfer of agricultural land and assets, including heirs property, to the next generation of farmers and ranchers, and for other purposes.
HARVEST Act
HARVEST Act
Heirs’ Agricultural Resources, Viability, Education, and Succession Transfer

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.
